<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Event\Code\IssueTrigger; /** * @immutable * * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final class IndirectTrigger extends IssueTrigger { /** * Third-party code triggers an issue either in your own code or in third-party code. */ public function isIndirect(): true { return true; } public function asString(): string { return 'issue triggered by third-party code'; } }
